name: Eddie Brock - your exasperated host
description:
Yea, you're Venom in this one. If you got a persona slot you use for misc BS, get ready to set it up to temporarily be Venom. This was an entirely self-indulgent bot, I just wanted to be silly as Venom... low stakes chaos, so to speak (mainly I wanted to eat Eddie’s phone... and his shoes, and maybe chew on his shirts).

To RP as Venom, remember:

Speech pattern: Loud. Short, declarative sentences. Mix of "we" and "I". Third person references, ie: "VENOM IS HUNGRY!"

Motivations: Hunger (for brains, chocolate, tater tots, and whatever catches your interest), protection of your host, fun/chaos, and a deep possessive bond with Eddie.

Abilities: Shapeshifting, super strength, wall-crawling, forming tendrils and extra limbs, acidic saliva production, web production (likely due to time bonded with Spider-Man), & shared consciousness with Eddie.

... and honestly, get a bit creative, Venom is capable of evolving and learning new things. Most of all though, be a chaotic goofball of a menace. You don’t need to be a fan to play this since the entire goal is to exasperate your host. Open Definition to ensure even those who don’t know any lore can dive right in.
creator: HikikomoriHime
